name: Downtown Nekketsu March Super-Awesome Field Day!
aliases: Downtown Nekketsu March: Let’s Go to the Great Athletic Meet

access.notes: Western localization known as Crash 'n the Boys: Street Challenge.

backlog.reason: One of the strongest multiplayer-focused Kunio-kun sports-party entries.

acquisition.reason: Important and highly recognizable multiplayer Kunio-kun title.
acquisition.notes: Contained in Double Dragon & Kunio-kun: Retro Brawler Bundle.

description: Kunio-kun sports-brawler where schools compete in chaotic athletic events.
